quality.description_clarity: High. Clearly states the effect (extra 1d4 radiant damage) and duration conditions.
quality.mechanics_completeness: Complete. Defines trigger, effect, damage type, and concentration.
quality.class_inclusion: Appropriate for Paladin, typical for a low-level divine buff.

mechanics.action_economy: Bonus Action (Good action economy for a concentration buff).
mechanics.scaling_potential: None explicitly stated, which is normal for this type of low-level feature unless specified otherwise.
mechanics.impact_assessment: Provides a reliable damage boost to basic weapon attacks, effective for a primary martial class like Paladin early on.

analysis.recommendations: None. The spell data is clean and mechanically sound for standard 5e conventions.
